## Summary

Describe the problem and the chosen approach.

## Compatibility impact

Describe effects on public behavior, plans, proof/schema versions, CLI or MCP clients, supported platforms, and existing automation. Write `None` when there is no compatibility impact.

## Validation

List the tests and checks you ran, including any focused regression test.

## Agentflow task loop

For planned work, link or summarize the locked plan, claimed steps, validation, drift audit, and proof verification. Do not attach raw `.agent/` output without review; see [Agent Artifact Policy](../docs/agent-artifacts.md).

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I updated documentation and tests needed by this change.
- [ ] I handled security concerns privately according to [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md), rather than in this PR.
